library.title: Clip library
library.reorderHint: Use the arrow buttons to reorder

stage.emptyHint: MP4 · MOV · WebM up to 200 MB

source.title: Source clip
source.uploadHint: Files are processed server-side and discarded after export.
source.transcribeHint: A local vision model watches representative frames of your video and writes a fresh narration that matches the visuals — it does not transcribe any existing audio.
source.externalWorkflowHint: Copy the external AI prompt below, run it in Gemini or ChatGPT with your video, then paste the narration here and sync timestamps.
source.nextStepHint: Upload a clip from the preview panel to get started, then head to the Transcript tab to generate your narration.
source.nextStepHintExternal: Upload a clip from the preview panel, then open the Transcript tab and use the external AI prompt to write your narration.
source.customTonePlaceholder: Describe the tone, style, or narrator persona…
source.repoContextPlaceholder: Paste a README, project description, key features, or any notes that will help the AI write a more accurate narration…
source.repoContextHint: Included in the copied external AI prompt (and in local generation when enabled) — add product names, terminology, or README notes for more accurate narration.

transcript.title: Transcript
transcript.empty: Run transcription or paste your own script. You can sync timestamps with the loaded video at any time.
transcript.emptyExternal: Copy the external AI prompt, paste the narration below, then sync timestamps with the loaded video.
transcript.label: Editable script
transcript.placeholder: Paste or edit your script — then sync timestamps with the video.
transcript.segmentsHint: Edit the in/out times directly to adjust when each caption appears.
transcript.noSegments: No timestamps yet — sync with the loaded video to generate them.
transcript.syncHint: Re-distribute timestamps across the loaded video so each line lines up with the timeline.
transcript.syncNeedsVideo: Load a video first to sync timestamps.

externalPrompt.title: External AI prompt (Gemini, ChatGPT, …)
externalPrompt.hint: Copy this prompt into an AI tool that can watch your video. Upload the same clip, paste the prompt, and ask it to narrate only what it sees — ignore any existing audio in the clip.

steps.upload: Upload the same video to your AI tool
steps.watchVisuals: Let the AI watch the full clip (visuals only — no audio)

externalPrompt.stats: Target ~{words} words (hard max {maxWords}) · {duration} clip · {wpm} wpm natural pace
externalPrompt.needsDuration: Load a video first so the prompt includes the correct duration and word target.
externalPrompt.copiedMessage: External transcript prompt copied to clipboard.
externalPrompt.copyFailedMessage: Could not copy the prompt — select and copy manually.

voice.title: Voice
voice.previewNotice: Speech is packed back-to-back with no gaps. Re-sync after editing the transcript.
voice.syncedAutoHint: Segments are timed to your video. Click Synthesize speech when you are ready to generate synced voiceover.
voice.previewSentence: Hi! I'm a Frameline voice. Pick me to narrate your next video.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.subtitle: Drag the in/out handles, scrub the playhead, or set bounds from the player.

export.title: Render final video
export.renderHint: Pick what to include below, then render. Trim, voiceover and captions all run in one pass on the server.
export.optionVoiceoverHint: Use the synthesized voice you generated on the Voice tab.
export.optionVoiceoverMissing: Generate a voice on the Voice tab to enable this.
export.optionCaptionsHint: Burns timed captions from your transcript into the picture.
export.optionCaptionsMissing: Transcribe the video on the Transcript tab to enable this.

introDetected.title: Intro detected
introDetected.message: Skipped {seconds}s of leading silence so the narration starts when content does.

transcribe.title: Script ready
transcribe.message: AI wrote a script that fits your video. Review and edit on the Transcript tab.

synth.title: Voice generated
synth.message: Synthesized audio is ready to preview or download.

cut.title: Clip trimmed
cut.message: The selected range has been saved as a new trimmed clip.

clip.title: Clip replaced
clip.message: The active clip was replaced with the selected range — the timeline now reflects the new bounds.

render.title: Final video ready
render.message: Your final video is ready. Use the Download button to save it.

sync.title: Timestamps synced
sync.message: Each line in the script is now aligned with the video timeline.

syncTrimmed.title: Script trimmed to fit video
syncTrimmed.message: Your transcript is longer than this clip can carry at natural speech speed. The last sentences were removed — shorten the script or use a longer video.

merge.title: Merge clips
merge.subtitle: Merge the videos in your library into a single file. Reorder them with the arrow buttons in the clip library shown in the preview panel.
merge.noLibrary: Upload videos from the preview panel first — they'll appear here for merging.
merge.orderNote: To change the merge order, use the arrow buttons in the clip library in the preview panel.

errors.needTwo: Add at least two videos to merge.
errors.maxReached: You can merge up to {max} clips per batch.

toast.mergedMessage: Your videos were merged in the chosen order.

replacedInLibrary.title: Library updated
replacedInLibrary.message: Merged clip replaced the source videos in your library.

trimDialog.title: Trim · {name}
trimDialog.subtitle: Source duration: {duration}. Drag the handles to choose what plays in the merged timeline.
